---
title: "Publications & Media"
---

The NYC Open Data Lab and its tools have been featured in external publications and community platforms focused on open data, data science, and education.

These features highlight the Lab’s approach to reproducible research, open data accessibility, and public-facing scholarship.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Featured Talks

### NYC Open Data Week 2026

**Teaching with NYC Open Data: Publishing Student Civic Research Through Reproducible Workflows**

- 🎥 [Watch the talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FjDyCY4MAO4)\
- 📊 [View slides](https://martinezc1.github.io/nyc-open-data-week-2026/#/title-slide)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### posit::conf(2026)

**Designing Reproducible Learning Ecosystems with R and Quarto**

- 🔗 [Conference sessions](https://conf.posit.co/2026/sessions/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### useR! 2026

**Teaching Reproducibility by Design: An End-to-End R Workflow Using Quarto, Open Data, and Package Development**

- 🔗 [Conference site](https://user2026.r-project.org/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Podcasts

-   [Relevance Drives Rigor: Exploring Open Data With R](https://civictech.chat/episodes/relevance-drives-rigor-exploring-open-data-with-r)

    -   **Civic Tech Chat**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Publications

-   [Relevance Drives Rigor: Lessons from Teaching with Open Data](https://aea365.org/blog/relevance-drives-rigor-lessons-from-teaching-with-open-data-by-christian-martinez/)

    -   **AEA365 (American Evaluation Association)**

-   [Faculty Member Launches Open-Source Tool to Transform Access to New York City Civic Data](https://www.brooklyn.edu/bc-brief/faculty-member-launches-open-source-tool-to-transform-access-to-new-york-city-civic-data/)

    -   **Brooklyn College News**

-   [nycOpenData: A Unified R Interface to NYC Open Data APIs](https://antoinesoetewey.medium.com/nycopendata-a-unified-r-interface-to-nyc-open-data-apis-fc63c6d32b90)

    -   **Medium (Antoine Soetewey)**

-   [nycOpenData: A Unified R Interface to NYC Open Data APIs](https://statsandr.com/blog/nycopendata-a-unified-r-interface-to-nyc-open-data-apis/)

    -   **Stats and R**
